name: Maverick Storm 4 SoloWash
comment: An outdoor-ready IP65-rated single source 1250W LED wash engineered to meet demand for classic wash looks with the modern features LDs expect and bright enough for stadium level long throws: CMY + CTO color mixing system offering a wide color palette, independent color wheel with CRI and CTB filters, expansive 8:1 zoom, rotating gobo wheel with interchangeable geometric gobos, framing shutters and frost.  Built with the durability and versatility to perform in any venue, indoors or out, and calibrated to match the colors of other Storm fixtures in the rig. Take control with DMX, RDM, sACN, Art-Net, or W-DMX.
